signals.raw:

signals.headline: Crypto Market Surge Driven by Iran Peace Talks Signal | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Crypto Market Surge Driven by Iran Peace Talks Signal | YES | HIGH confidence**

Iran has signaled intent to resume peace talks with the US before the April 22 ceasefire expiry, prompting Bitcoin to break $75,000, Ethereum to rally 7-8.6% to ~$2,370-$2,377 (from ~$2,196 yesterday), and Solana to rise 6.3% to ~$86 (from ~$82 prior close)[2][4][5][7].
